name: Assa Abloy AB
h1: Assa Abloy's GCC footprint in India
lede: Assa Abloy runs three centers across three Indian cities. Mumbai, Chennai and Gurugram, covering GBS, R&D and CoE, built over 21 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Assa Abloy office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Assa Abloy AB GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Assa Abloy runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Mumbai, Chennai, Gurugram), covering GBS, R&D and CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Director and Head of HR - SAARC Region

about.description: Assa Abloy's India footprint covers Mumbai, Chennai and Gurugram, spanning GBS, R&D and CoE. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seven decision-makers, in one profile.
